title: HIVE Digital Technologies Earnings Reports and Financial Data
text: MarketBeat maintains comprehensive earnings reports and financial data for HIVE Digital Technologies. The company's recent earnings have shown strong revenue growth with improving operational efficiency. Quarterly revenues have grown from $20M+ to $40M+ range as mining operations scale. Profitability metrics show improvement with positive adjusted EBITDA and cash flow. Bitcoin holdings growth demonstrates effective capital allocation. MarketBeat's consensus ratings show strong buy recommendations with analyst price targets suggesting continued upside. Earnings surprises have been mixed with recent quarters showing revenue beats. The company's forward guidance emphasizes continued production growth and HPC infrastructure scaling.
